'''mazhasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psephism|psephism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-zh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psephism|psephism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mazhasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæzhæshæth|mæzhæshæth]] || [[word:mæzhæshæj|mæzhæshæj]] || [[word:mæzhæshæsh|mæzhæshæsh]] || [[word:mæzhæshæ|mæzhæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazhazhashath|mazhazhashath]] || [[word:mazhazhashaj|mazhazhashaj]] || [[word:mazhazhashash|mazhazhashash]] || [[word:mazhazhasha|mazhazhasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazhashath|mazhashath]] || [[word:mazhashaj|mazhashaj]] || [[word:mazhashash|mazhashash]] || [[word:mazhasha|mazhasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazhafshath|mazhafshath]] || [[word:mazhafshaj|mazhafshaj]] || [[word:mazhafshash|mazhafshash]] || [[word:mazhafshaf|mazhafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazhashatha|mazhashatha]] || [[word:mazhashaja|mazhashaja]] || [[word:mazhashasha|mazhashasha]] || [[word:mazhashaka|mazhashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazhashath|mazhashath]] || [[word:mazhashaj|mazhashaj]] || [[word:mazhashash|mazhashash]] || [[word:mazhasha|mazhasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazhashathal|mazhashathal]] || [[word:mazhashajal|mazhashajal]] || [[word:mazhashashal|mazhashashal]] || [[word:mazhashakal|mazhashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazhashathatha|mazhashathatha]] || [[word:mazhashajaja|mazhashajaja]] || [[word:mazhashashasha|mazhashashasha]] || [[word:mazhashaka|mazhashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazhashathan|mazhashathan]] || [[word:mazhashajan|mazhashajan]] || [[word:mazhashashan|mazhashashan]] || [[word:mazhashakan|mazhashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazhashathaoro|mazhashathaoro]] || [[word:mazhashajaoro|mazhashajaoro]] || [[word:mazhashashaoro|mazhashashaoro]] || [[word:mazhashakaoro|mazhashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
